weaknesses: There is no mention of which ATL skills (e.g., research, time management, communication) were deployed.
The report lacks any examples or evidence demonstrating how skills supported the development or quality of the product.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: By omitting discussion of Approaches to Learning, the student misses the opportunity to show strategic use of skills. Detailed examples of skill application and their impact would strengthen understanding of the learning process and product development.

weaknesses: The submission lists references but does not articulate a clear, specific learning goal to guide the work.
Success criteria are entirely absent; there are no measurable or detailed benchmarks to assess progress.
No feasible plan is providedâsteps, sequencing and required resources are not outlined.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The planning component is severely underdeveloped. Without a defined learning goal and detailed success criteria, the student lacks direction. A coherent plan with explicit steps and resource allocation is essential to ensure the project is achievable and measurable.

weaknesses: Reflection on whether the product met success criteria is completely missing.
There is no evaluation of the impact of the process on personal learning or growth.
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Reflection is a critical phase for evaluating outcomes and synthesizing learning. Without it, the student cannot demonstrate how the experience informed their skills, understanding or future strategies.

annotations.comment: The submission currently only lists references and omits a clear learning goal and measurable success criteria. Begin your planning with a concise, specific goal and detailed criteria to guide your process.

There is no discussion of how ATL skills (e.g., research, time management, communication) were applied. Include detailed examples of skill use and evidence of their effectiveness on your product development.
Reflection on the productâs success and its impact on your learning is missing. Evaluate your outcome against each success criterion and explain how this process contributed to your growth.
